sprint: F4 — bonding-orbital Phillips-Kleinman closure attempt for W1e
verdict_summary: PK barrier predicted 0.194 Ha vs 4.37 Ha wall. Even at saturation (rank-1 PK on bonding orbital), closure asymptotes at 43% — still 33x experimental D_e. W1e re-diagnosed as 2-electron FCI correlation wall, not single-particle Pauli wall.

wall_taxonomy_update.W1e-FCI-correlation: NEWLY DIAGNOSED (F4 Step 1); was named in F3 as inner-region overattraction; now characterized as 2-electron FCI correlation channels, not single-particle Pauli wall

fci_sensitivity_rank1_pk.method: Inject dH = c * |bond><bond| on h1, run 2-electron FCI
fci_sensitivity_rank1_pk.structural_finding: Rank-1 PK on bonding orbital is structurally near-orthogonal to 2-electron FCI correlation channels at small R

gate_logic.intermediate_gate: TRIGGERED (formally proceed but FCI test sharpens to insufficient)
gate_logic.decision_rationale: FCI sensitivity test directly answers the gate question: at predicted barrier, well depth changes by 0.05%, far below the 2x experimental window [0.0375, 0.150] Ha. Per diagnostic-before-engineering rule, STOP.

regression_status: Sprint F3 regression (146 + 1 skipped) preserved bit-exactly (no code touched)

priority_1_F5_explicit_core_FCI.scope: Lift to 4 + N_core electron FCI with occupancy constraints on [Ne] core orbitals; 2-body Coulomb repulsion between bonding pair and core electrons acts as Pauli exclusion at correlated level
priority_1_F5_explicit_core_FCI.expected_closure: Physically motivated; could close to within ~2x experimental

priority_2_F4_extend_Schmidt.scope: Strict Schmidt orthogonalization of heavy-atom valence against [Ne] core BEFORE cross-block h1; modifies basis construction
priority_2_F4_extend_Schmidt.expected_closure: Open; depends on whether FCI correlation channels are addressed

priority_3_pivot_consolidate.scope: Pause chemistry arc; update CLAUDE.md/papers with F4 STOP verdict; pivot to math.OA paper drafts
